name: Larry Klayman
subject: An Invitation to the 3rd Continental Congress
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57490540:J5iCeml5N:m:1:3241986429:A35DDC8F7FCC22A5C4E66B4AC1F74230:r "Founding Fathers") American Patriot, I'll be blunt because you aren't stupid. Our Founding Fathers would be the first to revolt against the Biden-Harris regime. **Joe Biden and Kamala Harris make King George III 's reign look like a peaceful summer picnic.** Our nation is on its knees and on life support, and you and I must act quickly! My organization, Freedom Watch, is hosting the Third Continental Congress in Philadelphia on July 5th and 6th, and I must raise $111,589.43 to cover logistics, equipment and venue rental, and other costs. It's a small price to pay to re-ignite the flame of freedom and bring this once-in-a-lifetime event to millions of Americans free of charge. **[Will you INVEST in this historic event on the 245th Anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence by our Founding Fathers, or will you allow the total leftist takeover of our corrupt three branches of the federal government to continue until we transform into the tyranny we once opposed?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57490540:J5iCeml5N:m:1:3241986429:A35DDC8F7FCC22A5C4E66B4AC1F74230:r "Will you INVEST in this historic event on the 245th Anniversary of
the signing of the Declaration of Independence by our Founding Fathers, or will you allow the total leftist takeover of our corrupt three branches of
the federal government to continue until we transform into the tyranny we once opposed?")** **American patriots must once again declare our independence and plan for the future of our great constitutional republic.** In so doing, we will discuss, vote, and agree on additional proposed protections to insert into a reenacted and perfected Constitution, which will include but will not be limited to these urgent and necessary matters:
* **Enacting a fair and fraud free system to elect presidents** , vice presidents, and representatives in our new Congress, based on accountability, and to ensure that only citizens are voting;
* To make it clear that **government officials and federal judges do not have absolute immunity from being held accountable** for illegal actions and crimes against the citizenry, and to craft a functional means to remove and prosecute them for high crimes and misdemeanors as well as "bad behavior," as written into our original Constitution and ratified on June 21, 1788;
* To craft a system to get **federal judges and Supreme Court justices who are not the result of political patronage and legalized/illegal bribery** and to clarify that they do not have lifetime tenure and are elected and thus accountable to We the People;
* To insert into the Constitution a **prohibition to prevent discrimination based on political and ideological beliefs** , in addition to the current prohibition for discrimination based on race, sex, national origin, and religion;
* **To make it a capital one felony to knowingly take the life of the unborn** , who will be legally recognized as a human being, created by God, at conception;
* And finally, other additions and clarifications to the Constitution will be proposed, debated, and enacted once they are adopted by our Third Continental Congress.

Samuel Adams once said, "If ever a time should come, when vain and aspiring men shall possess the highest seats in Government, our country will stand in need of its experienced patriots to prevent its ruin." **[Freedom Watch is calling on liberty-loving Americans like you to help us host the Third Continental Congress. Will you chip in $35, $50, $100, or more to make this event meaningful to millions of Americans?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57490540:J5iCeml5N:m:1:3241986429:A35DDC8F7FCC22A5C4E66B4AC1F74230:r "Freedom Watch is calling on liberty-loving Americans like you to
help us host the Third Continental Congress. Will you chip in $35, $50, $100, or more to make this event meaningful to millions of Americans?")** We are at a pivotal crossroads in our nation's history - will we once again embrace the Vision of our Founders, or will we allow corrupt politicians to set us on a path toward socialism and national ruin? **[Please help Freedom Watch ensure we can host this once-in-a-lifetime event on July 5 th and 6th in Philadelphia by helping us reach our fundraising goal.](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57490540:J5iCeml5N:m:1:3241986429:A35DDC8F7FCC22A5C4E66B4AC1F74230:r "Please help Freedom Watch ensure we can host this
once-in-a-lifetime event on July 5th and 6th in Philadelphia by helping us reach our fundraising goal.")** For our future, [](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57490540:J5iCeml5N:m:1:3241986429:A35DDC8F7FCC22A5C4E66B4AC1F74230:r "Larry Klayman, Esq.") Larry Klayman, Esq.
Chairman and General Counsel
Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. The people must once again take this nation back 245 years later from the corrupt politicians, judges, and big corporations who control them, but that won't happen if we don't hold this Third Continental Congress. **[Can I count on you to INVEST $250, $500, or even $1,000 to help me cover the costs and bring this event to millions of Americans free of charge?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57490541:J5iCeml5N:m:1:3241986429:A35DDC8F7FCC22A5C4E66B4AC1F74230:r "Can I count on you to INVEST $250, $500, or
even $1,000 to help me cover the costs and bring this event to millions of Americans free of charge?")**
---

Friend -- I'll cut straight to the chase - tomorrow at midnight is the final fundraising deadline of our primary campaign, and I need your help. With just under two weeks to go until June 8, we almost have the money we need to spread our message to every corner of our Commonwealth and get out the vote, but we still have some work left to do. [**If you 're with me, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign before our deadline tomorrow at midnight to make sure we can bring real reform to the Attorney General's office?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZcoVSeDUZT1QSDl1IWU6z47oZRSzb8bx6nVaaQmpaks=/lj6uw55GaU20MRvxqHmZa1owFmzzeIFlsk8EhnIhKW8=) We have a real opportunity here to chart a new course in Virginia this year, to redefine what we value, prioritize, and highlight after accepting the status quo for far too long. We have an opportunity to highlight different voices, fresh faces, and new perspectives. We want leaders who are going to reflect our values and who understand the challenges of this new Virginia decade. [**I hope I can count on you to join me today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZcoVSeDUZT1QSDl1IWU6z47oZRSzb8bx6nVaaQmpaks=/lj6uw55GaU20MRvxqHmZa1owFmzzeIFlsk8EhnIhKW8=) \- Jay Jones

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: "Marjorie Taylor Greene is gone"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Dear Peter -- a petition demanding Nancy Pelosi remove me from
Congress surpassed 100,000 signatures from radical hate-America
leftists.
And now, Nancy Pelosi's top lieutenant Steny
Hoyer, the Democrat Majority Leader in the House, let it be known
he is coming after me.

STAND WITH MTG. FIGHT BACK AGAINST NANCY
PELOSI. CHIP IN $25 RIGHT AWAY
This is an important development, because
Steny Hoyer and Jim McGovern decide which bills comes up for a
vote.
As you can see, I need your help right away.
Make no mistake, unless you help me fight
back right now, they will bring the vote to the floor to kick me
out of Congress. . .
And they'll have the backing of Nancy Pelosi,
the Jihad Squad, and every Democrat in the House.
That's why I need your help to survive this
battle for a third time in just the last three months.
My team calculated the numbers and if we can
get 5,000 new donations with an average contribution of $15, $25,
or $35. . .we will have the resources available to fight back and
DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS' most recent attack on me.
Will please help fill my "Stand with MTG" war
chest with a generous contribution of $25 so that the
Democrats will think twice before trying to kick me out?
Mail, text, email, phone calls, digital ads,
radio and TV ads. It all cost money and I must contact my voters
to let them know the truth.
So you see why your emergency contribution of
$25 is so critical.
The simple fact is the Democrats couldn't get
me the first time.
Or the second time.
But now they're hoping the third times a
charm.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Never before has a Republican been under
attack like me since the Democrats tried to impeach and remove
President Trump from office.
Over the weekend, Democrats and the Fake News
Media cranked up their calls to KICK ME OUT of Congress.
CNN, MSNBC, PBS, ABC, NBC, CBS. . .
They went on all the channels demanding I be
removed from Congress because I dare to tell the truth about
their Socialist schemes.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Can I please count on an emergency
contribution of $25 right away?
You see, money talks in Washington, DC.
If they think I'm weak and don't have the
dollars to battle with them, they'll run me out.
But if they know I have the financial support
of the PEOPLE, they know no matter what they do, the voters will
be with me.
I'm enemy #1 of the Democrats and the Fake
News Media.
Please STAND WITH ME by making a generous
contribution to help me FIGHT BACK and WIN today!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

body:
I’m so glad to have you on this journey with us. I know that it’s going to be a long road to Election Day, and we’ve got a lot of work to do before then. That’s why I wanted to take a minute to welcome you to our team. | | | Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Congress in Virginia's 1st District. Support Stewart's campaign [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29776781/287470621/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdlZmE4My0zMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otY1KLeekLkwyVYQnfgWteaWXqrqF9r7PwnRabZf7hs=).
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29776782/287470622/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdlZmE4My0zMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otY1KLeekLkwyVYQnfgWteaWXqrqF9r7PwnRabZf7hs=) Peter, I’m so glad to have you on this journey with us. I know that it’s going to be a long road to Election Day, and we’ve got a lot of work to do before then. That’s why I wanted to take a minute to welcome you to our team. Too many Americans have lost faith in our country. I want folks to believe in America -- to believe in the promise of America. I grew up on a farm, attended public schools, graduated from the Naval Academy, and spent over 30 years in the Marines. I intend to approach this campaign with the same dedication and work ethic that I learned on the family farm and in the Corps -- and I know we can win. There are many challenges still facing our nation, from gun violence to healthcare to hyper-partisanship, but I intend to go to Washington to be a champion for all Americans by bringing people together to get the job done. If you can get on board with what we’re trying to do, I welcome you to this campaign and this movement to win Virginia’s First District and encourage you to **[chip in $10 today so that we can run a strong campaign into the midterms.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29776783/287470623/-1471272961?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdlZmE4My0zMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otY1KLeekLkwyVYQnfgWteaWXqrqF9r7PwnRabZf7hs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29776784/287470624/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdlZmE4My0zMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otY1KLeekLkwyVYQnfgWteaWXqrqF9r7PwnRabZf7hs=) | [**DONATE $25 NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29776785/287470625/2083141661?refcode=2105-welcome-email-1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdlZmE4My0zMWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=otY1KLeekLkwyVYQnfgWteaWXqrqF9r7PwnRabZf7hs=)

| | Look, Peter: if you think we're going to fix the broken Senate by looking to politicians in Harrisburg or Philadelphia, I'm probably not your guy. name: From the Desk of Marco Rubio
subject: I checked your profile...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk3OTE4Njc%3d&x=20d17128) at any time.
Friend, I want to thank you for staying up to date with me and my team.
|
---
| | | | [](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/201245/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=f9e9dbe7 "from the Desk of Marco rubio")
---

Friend, I want to thank you for staying up to date with me and my team. It's so important that we have supporters like you that stay engaged and in the loop on what we face in this race, and your feedback on our surveys and petitions is always helpful for me to read.

One thing you've probably noticed is that it's so hard to stay in this race if we don't have the funds to keep us afloat. I know you saw the headlines last week that national Democrats like Pelosi and Schumer are recruiting a radical candidate who will push their socialist agenda and who they can introduce to their network of millionaire donors.

I rely on supporters like you, friend, not woke billionaires. However, I checked your profile, and I was wondering if you could update your information for us?
| PROFILE FOR: Friend
---
Date: _**[May 26, 2021](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/201245/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=dfbfb2a3 "May 26, 2021")**_
Best Email Contact: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/201245/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=56460ff1 "\[emailaddr\]")**_
Best Phone Number: _**[[ MISSING ]](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/201245/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=111243fd "\[ MISSING \]")**_
May End of Month Donation: _**[[ MISSING ]](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/201245/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=f1cd4371 "\[ MISSING \]")**_

We need you on this team now more than ever. The Democrats are ramping up quickly, and if we fail to reach our goals this early Well, I really hope we don't find out what will happen to this country if that happens, but I can assure you that it will mean Democrats passing some of their most radical ideas.

My parents fled Cuba to escape the same socialist policies that Democrats are calling for today. I will never stop fighting to protect America and the American Dream that makes our country the greatest in the world.

Thank you for taking a moment to update your profile today.

Marco Rubio
|
---
[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9791867/224717773/134304/7/)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---
P.O. Box 661537
Miami, FL 33266

body:
Their top priority - spending big in battleground districts like Young Kim's!

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EsuGoKw4Jw57N2U0cvKN2pHJh8HbwB8dQerAxpImY8ovOFkEFfe3WSR4vKIJw80AAtoZJtY68YiXaVyustmnGn2mSEa4oYoJnXLKwUcB_WNT35MZ4Gh_aYQxbH6UPBEMfCtmhD82u8gfo4grJvt_qKk9-HrUkDy-i9vNQSAgWA2EGTrmPVC-o5xvKiFiNawRhv0pVzoPGb28srw1jHN4ONY1zePuNHSwO6RH-VgU7pADmxKzaUHpOP_JVsOSSrv6GetE_vT2CqbUPUVeYQ8ADiFmZ50wfPEFlbpyzCP97ZTsup9Jk0WZJR4lGCVc4wFt6IhOUR7aYehInsR2jVvrxw1dsgSRo8IWczLENJUMMjJn1auLrcL7Z5nTQHFNLkto1Jqi-ApHuqjGzEO3J4lMNVUk8BRDxIUg5FRfU_6eLUE=&c=vvn5MaKR8NbtvqRBsxcdm8LHlw413x_8QWHa8Y4GWPEEcwX-KwyZ4Q==&ch=KVJwpocRiKAn1F-3s1Q8ZhgqdbPQ7uRyV-BZ5G-gbxFyHvYfJxU3Yg==)
---
**House Democrats' campaign arm pulls in $12.2 million in April, topping GOP counterpart** _- The Hill_ Friend, it's Martin from Team Young. Democrats are hellbent on expanding their Majority in the House, and if they keep fundraising at this speed, they'll defeat us worse than EVER before. _Their top priority - spending big in battleground districts like Young Kim's! _ Our critical end of month deadline is just around the corner. This is our next opportunity to prove we have what it takes to win. So we're asking our top 150 supporters today to make a donation of just **$10** or more to build our defenses against them. [**Can we count on you to do that?**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EsuGoKw4Jw57N2U0cvKN2pHJh8HbwB8dQerAxpImY8ovOFkEFfe3WSR4vKIJw80AAtoZJtY68YiXaVyustmnGn2mSEa4oYoJnXLKwUcB_WNT35MZ4Gh_aYQxbH6UPBEMfCtmhD82u8gfo4grJvt_qKk9-HrUkDy-i9vNQSAgWA2EGTrmPVC-o5xvKiFiNawRhv0pVzoPGb28srw1jHN4ONY1zePuNHSwO6RH-VgU7pADmxKzaUHpOP_JVsOSSrv6GetE_vT2CqbUPUVeYQ8ADiFmZ50wfPEFlbpyzCP97ZTsup9Jk0WZJR4lGCVc4wFt6IhOUR7aYehInsR2jVvrxw1dsgSRo8IWczLENJUMMjJn1auLrcL7Z5nTQHFNLkto1Jqi-ApHuqjGzEO3J4lMNVUk8BRDxIUg5FRfU_6eLUE=&c=vvn5MaKR8NbtvqRBsxcdm8LHlw413x_8QWHa8Y4GWPEEcwX-KwyZ4Q==&ch=KVJwpocRiKAn1F-3s1Q8ZhgqdbPQ7uRyV-BZ5G-gbxFyHvYfJxU3Yg==) | **END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING: DEADLINE APPROACHING**
---
**Goal:** 150 contributions
**Deadline:** May 31, 2021 @ 11:59 PM | [**CHIP IN NOW**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EsuGoKw4Jw57N2U0cvKN2pHJh8HbwB8dQerAxpImY8ovOFkEFfe3WSR4vKIJw80AAtoZJtY68YiXaVyustmnGn2mSEa4oYoJnXLKwUcB_WNT35MZ4Gh_aYQxbH6UPBEMfCtmhD82u8gfo4grJvt_qKk9-HrUkDy-i9vNQSAgWA2EGTrmPVC-o5xvKiFiNawRhv0pVzoPGb28srw1jHN4ONY1zePuNHSwO6RH-VgU7pADmxKzaUHpOP_JVsOSSrv6GetE_vT2CqbUPUVeYQ8ADiFmZ50wfPEFlbpyzCP97ZTsup9Jk0WZJR4lGCVc4wFt6IhOUR7aYehInsR2jVvrxw1dsgSRo8IWczLENJUMMjJn1auLrcL7Z5nTQHFNLkto1Jqi-ApHuqjGzEO3J4lMNVUk8BRDxIUg5FRfU_6eLUE=&c=vvn5MaKR8NbtvqRBsxcdm8LHlw413x_8QWHa8Y4GWPEEcwX-KwyZ4Q==&ch=KVJwpocRiKAn1F-3s1Q8ZhgqdbPQ7uRyV-BZ5G-gbxFyHvYfJxU3Yg==)
---
**Last month Young Kim 's seat was listed as a top target by the Left. This month, they're declaring it a "toss-up." We have to kick it into high gear ASAP... or the worst possible outcome will be our reality. **
We have our work cut out for us, but WITH YOUR HELP, Young Kim will be able to continue the fight for common sense solutions in Washington.
So, Friend, I'm asking you again - [**can we count on you to do your part to help? body:
Democrats will spend whatever it takes to take back control of Concord after an embarrassing 2020 election.

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/1/01000179a8af9de2-88784b52-ad08-4ea6-a853-f0fc0b6e628e-000000/pRHAxZuZkPff-p6mrlu6lYnIU-Q=215)
---
| | Derek,

After an embarrassing 2020 election, Democrats will spend BIG to take back control of Concord.

We cannot simply let them spend their way to victory. [We need your help to fight back!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/2/01000179a8af9de2-88784b52-ad08-4ea6-a853-f0fc0b6e628e-000000/WF2BFNXjTQwBgnsjpvSfKCj_Pd8=215)

---
| As Democrats continue to bring in big money from out-of-state donors, we need your help to keep up.

We're trying to raise $5,000 before the end of May. [Can you make a contribution today?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/4/01000179a8af9de2-88784b52-ad08-4ea6-a853-f0fc0b6e628e-000000/90QV15_ghzmK9Raq4xiVOc2ByG4=215)

After we took back control of the State Senate, State House of Representatives, and Executive Council in 2020, Democrats have turned to out-of-state donors to get them back in the race. In the recent Merrimack special election, _Democrats spent nearly $100,000 on a State Representative race_ to try push their candidate to victory.

The truth is that elections continue to get more and more expensive, and we need your help to remain competitive, at both the top of the ticket and the bottom.

[Can you donate $10, $25, or even $50 today to help Defend our majorities in Concord?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/5/01000179a8af9de2-88784b52-ad08-4ea6-a853-f0fc0b6e628e-000000/02LACqs1V8VY1F8YgrZ-P2WfLuo=215)

The truth is that elections continue to get more and more expensive, and we need your help to remain competitive, at both the top of the ticket and the bottom. | Derek, we need YOUR support in order to protect our majorities in Concord. Can we count on your support? | "Donate Today!" | | | "Donate $10" | | | "Donate $25" | | | "Donate $50" | | | "Donate $100" | | | "Donate $250" | | | "Donate $500" | | P.S. the Democrats are going to do everything they can in 2022 to take back power and we're going to need every available resource to fight back and win. _ | "Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee." You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can at any time. 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States of America

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: I see my role differently
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29785626/287500596/-109168821?refcode=210526-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGU3YmIyOC00MmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0V76C-uYr2Z33tUAPxoYXC8i99KYYJ4Os2TwRBx35HY=) Peter, In the Marines, we never let partisan politics get in the way of accomplishing the mission. I want to bring that culture to Washington because I deeply believe we must deliver meaningful results to our fellow Americans to restore their belief in our basic institutions of government. Congress must address the challenges that are right in front of us. The nation’s leadership must be willing to do the hard work to expand access to healthcare, clean up our polluted rivers, fix our crumbling infrastructure and bring home real results to Americans. I believe that it is time for a new kind of politician to represent our district. One who understands how to restore trust in our democracy -- one who will work hard for the people of this district. I will go to Congress and do the job, but I need your help to get there. **[We’re trying to raise $6,000 by May 31st to head into the summer with the wind at our backs. The nation’s leadership must be willing to do the hard work to expand access to healthcare, clean up our polluted rivers, fix our crumbling infrastructure and bring home real results to Americans. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Mitch McConnell opposes a bipartisan probe into January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
We need to stop this behavior in its tracks.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Last week, with bipartisan support, the House passed a bill to create a bipartisan commission to probe and investigate January's insurrection at the Capitol. Now, Mitch McConnell is vocally opposing it, putting new pressure on other Republicans in the Senate to also vote against it. Senator McConnell and his party have not only cynically abdicated any responsibility for what happened on that day but are now actively standing in the way of a bipartisan investigation that would review the events of that fateful day, the steps that led up to it, and recommendations for the future. Americans deserve an investigation into an event that struck at the heart of our democracy. This is just another sign of the Republican Party's continued entanglement with Donald Trump and opposition to the truth, especially when it comes to election-related matters. We need to stop this behavior in its tracks. **[We need to know what happened on January 6th in order to prevent it from happening again. We need a bipartisan investigation of the Capitol insurrection. Sign on today to urge Mitch McConnell to reconsider his opposition to the bipartisan bill that would establish this commission.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Thank you for adding your name. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/vWNxcVra-VSd/aTNTTXF6bzFvajYrY3Byc2QvbVV2L0hFeDk0SDlrQ1EyRVgxL2JrTFdsaThQVTdNa0dKNHFYaGxUdG01aHYvWWI3Ri9FNFFmb1BUZGFCM0prd3NXTDJlb0JNZTg2WUdZeDgvcGRrUmpDUnc9S0/dUw2ejViYlB2bVpJb3grODBLT1M1Y3JhN29mcUtLVmdoQlVIZmgrNEFQMjBEODQ5WFJIbllJMVhpTU1tRnZIcFQzcDRPeER2N1Y2ajA0Z3ZRNkt6UVBWTTZRQWxML0VTS0)

Friend, I want to thank you for staying up to date with me and my team. It's so important that we have supporters like you that stay engaged and in the loop on what we face in this race, and your feedback on our surveys and petitions is always helpful for me to read.

One thing you've probably noticed is that it's so hard to stay in this race if we don't have the funds to keep us afloat. I know you saw the headlines last week that national Democrats like Pelosi and Schumer are recruiting a radical candidate who will push their socialist agenda and who they can introduce to their network of millionaire donors.

I rely on supporters like you, Friend, not woke billionaires. However, I checked your profile, and I was wondering if you could update your information for us?
| PROFILE FOR: Friend

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Gasoline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Dear Peter,

Since we launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate last month, I've been traveling all across Wisconsin to meet folks where they are and hear their stories. Everywhere I've gone, I've been amazed by Wisconsinites' perseverance, generosity, and courage.

Folks are ready to do what it takes to help our state and country bounce back stronger than ever. But we need someone in the Senate who will be a partner in moving us forward. **That person is not Ron Johnson.**

**[I'm running for Senate to make real change for hardworking families, but I can't win alone. Running a successful campaign takes resources, so my team and I have set a goal of raising $15,000 before Sunday's end-of-month deadline. Everywhere I've gone, I've been amazed by Wisconsinites' perseverance, generosity, and courage. Folks are ready to do what it takes to help our state and country bounce back stronger than ever. But we need someone in the Senate who will be a partner in moving us forward. May 31st is our end-of-month deadline, and we need to show strong grassroots support to keep pace with our multi-millionaire and billionaire opponents. While my opponents can rely on self-funding or their millionaire friends on Wall Street, I rely on you. Or I’ll have another garage sale to raise money to fund our campaign. However, I’m running out of stuff to sell. = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We all know the people we’re up against. Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. | | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots taking Swampy scalps, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=42b3009579&e=ba6e67b849)!

**35 RINOs voted with Democrats for political persecution of America First conservatives this week. **

It is crucial that you understand what happened here.

Nancy Pelosi held a vote this week on creating a "Commission" to investigate the January 6 events at the Capitol.

This legislation, however, is a blatant attempt to politically persecute Pelosi's enemies. How do we know this?

"Look at the opening language of the document:

_ To investigate and report upon the facts and causes relating to the January 6, 2021, domestic terrorist attack upon the United States Capitol Complex (_**hereafter referred to as the ‘‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’’**_)..."_

Make no mistake, they want to pin all America First patriots as "domestic terrorists".

And what's more, 35 "Republicans" voted for this attempted political persecution.

_Ask yourself: why do these RINOs hate their own base so much?_

| **Notice how 9 of the 10 Impeachment Republicans are on here too. **

I've been telling you for a while, the Swamp _of both parties_ HATES patriots. They look down on us and strive to stick a knife in our backs when they think we aren't looking.

But thanks to President Trump, we noticed!

**_If we don't make an example of them, they will never get it_ \- and the Swamp will know they can own any Republican Congressman at their leisure.**

| |
1. Texas launched Operation Lone Star in order to secure the border, crack down on human trafficking, and combat the smuggling of drugs into our state and nation.
2. The Texas Department of Public Safety and the Texas National Guard have apprehended more than 30,000 people crossing the border and arrested 900.
3. There has been an 800% increase from April of 2020 to April of 2021 in the amount of fentanyl that has been apprehended by the Texas Department of Public Safety.

If it wasn't clear before, Friend, it sure is now. **It's TEXAS who is taking the necessary steps to work towards securing the border.

subject: a new racist formula
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Listen up, team. Under the Senate version of _SB7_ , Republican senators are proposing a new formula to assess the number of polling places in each district, **specifically** targeting the state’s largest (AKA Democratic) counties. That means counties with more voters of color— particularly Black and Hispanic communities — would see a significant cut in polling places compared to majority-white counties. Just take a look at this damning analysis done by the _Texas Tribune_ : [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29790927/287519787/-1231269280?amount=5&&refcode=em210526-pollingrestrictions&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmVlODRmOC00ZWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZQ27zD0ZZlTLwu1e1PthPBR-_NJKFgrnTf91mIHV7Q=) **Dan Patrick is trying to drastically limit voting locations for one reason only: to take down democracy and keep a bunch of sorry, corrupt, and incompetent political hacks in power — including himself.** If this flagrantly racist formula moves forward, it will disenfranchise thousands of voters of color and make it even harder for Texans to vote. We cannot let the Texas GOP restrict access to the ballot for communities of color and roll back voting rights for all Texans. **Dan Patrick and Gov. Greg Abbott are legislating Jim Crow tactics designed to suppress the vote. We’re counting on Texans to stand up against _SB7_ and fight back. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29790971/287519972/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210526-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODU0ZTExNC00ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_A8Eg2JLWYJ6rUA4yeZPrWrzAeySOt0LDbvEVntSQY=&emci=0754e114-4fbe-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0854e114-4fbe-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)

Peter, in a moment I’m going to ask you to make a contribution toward our campaign for Lt. Governor. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, especially today. Tomorrow night, we will close the books on our final public fundraising deadline before the primary election. A few days later, we will file a report with state election officials and our numbers will be made public for everyone to see. I’m really proud of this report and what it says about our campaign. Peter, this report shares more than just how much we’ve raised — more importantly, it tells the world how many people are with us and have chipped in because they believe in what we’re building together. Our numbers are proof that this campaign, our organizing efforts, ads, and more are built by folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can — and that’s a big deal. But we are down to the wire here and my team says we’re a little behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal tomorrow night. With the primary election less than two weeks away, this deadline could not be more important, so I’m hoping you will pitch in to help us catch up. **So, will you chip in $10 and say you’re all in for this people-powered movement? Anything you can give will make a difference in helping us hit our critical reporting deadline and winning this election.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29790972/287519973/2006474955?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=hla-em-210526-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODU0ZTExNC00ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_A8Eg2JLWYJ6rUA4yeZPrWrzAeySOt0LDbvEVntSQY=)

clean_body: | Peter, in a moment I’m going to ask you to make a contribution toward our campaign for Lt. Governor. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, especially today. Tomorrow night, we will close the books on our final public fundraising deadline before the primary election. A few days later, we will file a report with state election officials and our numbers will be made public for everyone to see. I’m really proud of this report and what it says about our campaign. Peter, this report shares more than just how much we’ve raised — more importantly, it tells the world how many people are with us and have chipped in because they believe in what we’re building together. Our numbers are proof that this campaign, our organizing efforts, ads, and more are built by folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can — and that’s a big deal. But we are down to the wire here and my team says we’re a little behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal tomorrow night. With the primary election less than two weeks away, this deadline could not be more important, so I’m hoping you will pitch in to help us catch up. So, will you chip in $10 and say you’re all in for this people-powered movement? Anything you can give will make a difference in helping us hit our critical reporting deadline and winning this election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for reading and pitching in, if you can. — Hala As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. name: Mark Levine
subject: It's me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Levine for Virginia
body:
Hey, it’s Mark! We’re at an inflection point as a nation and as a state. These past few months, we’ve seen what compassionate leadership can mean for our country. And we’ve seen the same at the state level here in Virginia. When you elect compassionate Democrats, the people benefit. We’ve also seen the forces around the country and in our own state that are fighting tooth and nail to halt and roll back our progress. Forces that would rather allow people to suffer than offer a lending hand; that push lies instead of truth, and choose to ignore the reality of the people around them. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29790980/287520012/-882399060?refcode=210526-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODYwNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDNlOTYyMy00ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BMh8z7jZgTQxW3P5GPO_gx4irm7eDi6b5WKiP37C9bc=) Hey, it's Mark! We’re at an inflection point as a nation and as Virginians. These past few months, we’ve seen what compassionate leadership can mean for our country. We’ve also seen the forces around the country and in Virginia that are fighting tooth and nail to halt and roll back our progress. Forces that would rather allow people to suffer than offer a lending hand; who push lies instead of truth, and choose to ignore science and the reality of the people around them. I have worked my entire life to give voice to those who have too little and to help those in need. Whether it was fighting for Rainbow equality in Virginia, reproductive health, or helping to expand Medicare to over 400,000 residents of this state -- I’ve been here for the people. And I’ve led the way to keep dangerous weapons out of the hands of dangerous people, so we can feel safe in our streets. I intend to continue that work as your Lieutenant Governor. In his first year in office, the 25th district's elected representative has proven that he has the worst possible judgment.

Here's a rundown of some of Mike Garcia's finest moments so far in Congress:
* He voted to overturn the Electoral College results (_after_ an angry mob of Trump supporters took over the Capitol).
* He voted against impeaching Donald Trump after the insurrection.
* He voted to keep QAnon Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene on her congressional committees.
* He voted against forming a commission to investigate the January 6th insurrection, flip-flopping from his promise to support it.

clean_body: | In his first year in office, the 25th district's elected representative has proven that he has the worst possible judgment. Here's a rundown of some of Mike Garcia's finest moments so far in Congress: He voted to overturn the Electoral College results (after an angry mob of Trump supporters took over the Capitol). He voted against impeaching Donald Trump after the insurrection. He voted to keep QAnon Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene on her congressional committees. He voted against forming a commission to investigate the January 6th insurrection, flip-flopping from his promise to support it. = Peter, we know we've told you all this before. But we'll keep pointing out Mike Garcia's failures for as long as it takes \-- until we can kick him out of Congress once and for all. As the saying goes, when someone shows you who they are, believe them. Mike has shown us exactly who he is since he was sworn into office a year ago. If he's re-elected in 2022, we can only expect more of the same. Are you willing to risk a second term for Mike? We're not. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Let's win this thing, Flip CA-25 | Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws. *

body:
****
Time to lift the lockdowns
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9793166/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk3OTMxNjY%3d&x=c9dc2d61)************
Friend,

Remember when Democrats were clamoring to "follow the science"? Well not anymore, since _the science_ no longer fits their agenda -- to exert complete control over you. Red states are the ones actually following the science, while blue states continue to IGNORE the CDC's recommendations to lift lockdown restrictions and mask mandates.

Florida and Texas have led the way, giving their residents the freedom to decide for themselves, but Democrat state ~~leaders~~ overlords refuse to relinquish their unauthorized power.

Your input is critical to our success. Send us an email with your feedback: info@rslc.gop Connect with us on == and ==. Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. Hoosier Republican,

We’re in the thick of our end-of-month fundraising, and quickly running out of time to reach our goal!

Our state is THRIVING thanks to Governor Holcomb and our Republican leadership. But we can’t sit back and just rest on our laurels. The left is raising money hand over fist to try and bring a blue wave to our great state, because they cannot STAND how well we are doing.

In order to keep up and hit our fundraising goal this month, we’re asking everyone to chip in their best gift right now. Please help us keep Indiana RED!
CHIP IN $5 TO KEEP INDIANA RED >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-eom2-052621?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_EOM2_052621&utm_agency=alpha&amount=5&mc_cid=a5cda95800&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Fellow American:

Democrats are engaged in an all-out assault on the principles of freedom that make America great. They want to:

❌ Keep your schools closed
❌ Open your border
❌ Take your guns
❌ Raise your taxes
❌ Cancel your culture
❌ Pack your Supreme Court

The only way we can protect our individual liberties is by winning a conservative majority and removing Nancy Pelosi from power.

That is no small task, and I need your help today if we're going to have the resources to win the most competitive races.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Fwd: "Marjorie Taylor Greene is gone..."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
"Petition Demanding Marjorie Taylor Greene's Expulsion Amasses
Over 100,000 Signatures"
"I've been trained to assess threats and
there is a serious threat to our country sitting in Congress that
goes by the name of Marjorie Taylor Greene," Weissman wrote in
the petition."
Peter -- I'm public enemy #1.
100,000+ hate-America leftists have signed
their petition demanding I be expelled from Congress.
The Fake News Media gives them air support
with nasty smears about me in every article and every prime time
news slot.
CNN. WaPo. Newsweek. It's all the same:
Marjorie Taylor Greene Must Be Expelled!
And now Nancy Pelosi's top lieutenant has put
a huge red target on my back for expulsion. . .

STAND WITH MTG. FIGHT BACK AGAINST NANCY
PELOSI. CHIP IN $25 RIGHT AWAY
You and I cannot let them win. Please read my
email below detailing how serious the situation is.
After you read, I hope you'll rush an
emergency contribution of $25 immediately.
If I am expelled, it's only a matter of time
before they do this to the next America First Republican who
doesn't back down to the leftist mob.
And eventually, they'll come for you.
I'm fighting to stop them.
Talk soon,
--MTG

------------begin forwarded
message------------
Dear Peter -- a petition demanding Nancy
Pelosi remove me from Congress surpassed 100,000 signatures from
radical hate-America leftists.
And now, Nancy Pelosi's top lieutenant Steny
Hoyer, the Democrat Majority Leader in the House, let it be known
he is coming after me.

STAND WITH MTG. FIGHT BACK AGAINST NANCY
PELOSI. CHIP IN $25 RIGHT AWAY
This is an important development, because
Steny Hoyer and Jim McGovern decide which bills comes up for a
vote.
As you can see, I need your help right away.
Make no mistake, unless you help me fight
back right now, they will bring the vote to the floor to kick me
out of Congress. . .
And they'll have the backing of Nancy Pelosi,
the Jihad Squad, and every Democrat in the House.
That's why I need your help to survive this
battle for a third time in just the last three months.
My team calculated the numbers and if we can
get 5,000 new donations with an average contribution of $15, $25,
or $35. . .we will have the resources available to fight back and
DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS' most recent attack on me.
Will please help fill my "Stand with MTG" war
chest with a generous contribution of $25 so that the
Democrats will think twice before trying to kick me out?
Mail, text, email, phone calls, digital ads,
radio and TV ads. It all cost money and I must contact my voters
to let them know the truth.
So you see why your emergency contribution of
$25 is so critical.
The simple fact is the Democrats couldn't get
me the first time.
Or the second time.
But now they're hoping the third times a
charm.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Never before has a Republican been under
attack like me since the Democrats tried to impeach and remove
President Trump from office.
Over the weekend, Democrats and the Fake News
Media cranked up their calls to KICK ME OUT of Congress.
CNN, MSNBC, PBS, ABC, NBC, CBS. . .
They went on all the channels demanding I be
removed from Congress because I dare to tell the truth about
their Socialist schemes.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Can I please count on an emergency
contribution of $25 right away?
You see, money talks in Washington, DC.
If they think I'm weak and don't have the
dollars to battle with them, they'll run me out.
But if they know I have the financial support
of the PEOPLE, they know no matter what they do, the voters will
be with me.
I'm enemy #1 of the Democrats and the Fake
News Media.
Please STAND WITH ME by making a generous
contribution to help me FIGHT BACK and WIN today!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

body:
This race is not going to be easy.

| | | We need 10,000 donations before midnight tomorrow. | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29793149/287527198/-2023814932?refcode=20210526_PB_5BO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTcyZjc1Ny01NmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1XmojNLxWlOuQbBaKuGYBO4H01E5_G1OhzpZGM9Gj0=)
---
In a moment I’m going to ask you to donate to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign to be Virginia’s next Governor. First, let me explain to you why your support is so important.

A couple weeks back, extremist Glenn Youngkin spent millions of his own money buying the Republican nomination. Now he’s promising to spend $75 million more to win Virginia’s Governor’s office for himself and Donald Trump.

In a close race, that kind of money makes a huge difference. And guess what? Experts like Dave Wasserman from the Cook Political Report are saying Youngkin has a real chance to win.

I’m going to be blunt: if Terry can’t build a grassroots army to match Youngkin, Democrats will lose the Virginia Governor’s race. It’s that important.

Instead of a champion like Terry, we’ll get a culture-warrior, extremist who won the Republican primary by pushing Donald Trump’s lies about a stolen election.

Derek, Terry might not have Glenn’s bottomless bank account -- but I believe he has something better: you.

**And if Terry can reach his goal of finding 10,000 contributions before tomorrow at midnight, it will go a long way toward sending Glenn Youngkin the message that we’re ready to fight like hell to stop him and Donald Trump.**

**[Can you donate right now and help Terry reach his deadline goal? We need just 1,355 contributions before midnight tomorrow and with your support, I know we can get it done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29793152/287527232/-2023814932?refcode=20210526_PB_5BO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTcyZjc1Ny01NmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1XmojNLxWlOuQbBaKuGYBO4H01E5_G1OhzpZGM9Gj0=)**

Thanks so much,

Paul

clean_body: This race is not going to be easy. | | | = | | | We need 10,000 donations before midnight tomorrow. | = In a moment I’m going to ask you to donate to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign to be Virginia’s next Governor. First, let me explain to you why your support is so important. A couple weeks back, extremist Glenn Youngkin spent millions of his own money buying the Republican nomination. Now he’s promising to spend $75 million more to win Virginia’s Governor’s office for himself and Donald Trump. In a close race, that kind of money makes a huge difference. And guess what? Experts like Dave Wasserman from the Cook Political Report are saying Youngkin has a real chance to win. I’m going to be blunt: if Terry can’t build a grassroots army to match Youngkin, Democrats will lose the Virginia Governor’s race. It’s that important. Instead of a champion like Terry, we’ll get a culture-warrior, extremist who won the Republican primary by pushing Donald Trump’s lies about a stolen election. Derek, Terry might not have Glenn’s bottomless bank account -- but I believe he has something better: you. And if Terry can reach his goal of finding 10,000 contributions before tomorrow at midnight, it will go a long way toward sending Glenn Youngkin the message that we’re ready to fight like hell to stop him and Donald Trump. = Thanks so much, Paul = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

This is so important to our efforts to retake the Majority, that 's why I'm reaching out to you. == == == Bob Latta and I fight every day for Conservative values in America and now we need top patriots like YOU to show your support. This is your chance to be a key player in the future of America. Every supporter that steps up can and will make a difference in the outcome of the fight to retake our Republican majority. But there isn't much time --- == Thank you, Friend Rep. Michelle Steel PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY LATTA FOR CONGRESS PO Box 106 Bowling Green, OH 43402 == ** ** | | LATTA FOR CONGRESS | PO Box 106, Bowling Green, OH 43402 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

**4 Dollars**...is what could make the difference in a win or a loss for the GOP on June 1st._

The countdown is on Fellow Conservative, and right now, **we 're behind. **

Deep pocket, Far Left mega donors are working to buy this seat just to keep Nancy Pelosi in charge.

**We cannot let that happen. **

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Your contribution – of any amount – will make a huge difference for our movement.
#

**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our end-of-month deadline – which is this upcoming Monday. My team has set a goal to raise $15,000 by then.**
Let me explain why a contribution – of any amount – will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-may-eom).**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29793992/287529699/-1739222507?refcode2=203db7cf-5abe-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDNkYjdjZi01YWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kk8UlJJw8pvbsU_1Rw39_uUQD_treOuMpBJAk-cNAU=)
This has been another big month for our movement. At the start of the month, Senator Elizabeth Warren and I rolled out the Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act, which would ensure that all children get off to a strong start — not just children with parents who can afford to pay for pricey child care.
And through my Policy Is Personal PAC, we have continued to endorse and support bold, progressive candidates like Nina Turner and Melanie Stansbury, who we need in Congress fighting for working people.
However, this month also brought a preview of some tough battles we have to come. House Republicans voted Liz Cheney out as Chair of their caucus for simply acknowledging reality — that President Biden won the election fair and square. The party of Donald Trump is alive and well, with or without him as president. For the sake of our democracy, we must keep Congress in Democratic control.
Also this month, the Supreme Court announced it would hear a case that may severely restrict abortion rights in this country — and result in _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned. We need to keep the pressure on Congress and President Biden to expand the Court, because if we fail to act, we risk losing abortion rights, voting rights, and democracy itself.
Our movement has a lot of work to do, and I am working overtime to get it done.
But in order to keep up this fight, I have to ensure that my re-election campaign has the funds it needs to fight off any primary and Republican challengers. Last cycle, the field included several self-funded candidates trying to buy this seat. We have to prepare for that to happen again.
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $15,000 end-of-month goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities in Congress, not fundraising for re-election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29793993/287529700/-1739222507?refcode2=203db7cf-5abe-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDNkYjdjZi01YWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kk8UlJJw8pvbsU_1Rw39_uUQD_treOuMpBJAk-cNAU=)**
Thank you for your ongoing support. It is the honor of my life to serve in Congress, and I’m just getting started.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29793994/287529701/-1476811792?refcode2=203db7cf-5abe-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDNkYjdjZi01YWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kk8UlJJw8pvbsU_1Rw39_uUQD_treOuMpBJAk-cNAU=)**

House Republicans voted Liz Cheney out as Chair of their caucus for simply acknowledging reality — that President Biden won the election fair and square. The party of Donald Trump is alive and well, with or without him as president. For the sake of our democracy, we must keep Congress in Democratic control. Also this month, the Supreme Court announced it would hear a case that may severely restrict abortion rights in this country — and result in Roe v. Wade being overturned. We need to keep the pressure on Congress and President Biden to expand the Court, because if we fail to act, we risk losing abortion rights, voting rights, and democracy itself. Our movement has a lot of work to do, and I am working overtime to get it done. But in order to keep up this fight, I have to ensure that my re-election campaign has the funds it needs to fight off any primary and Republican challengers. Last cycle, the field included several self-funded candidates trying to buy this seat. We have to prepare for that to happen again. = Thank you for your ongoing support. It is the honor of my life to serve in Congress, and I’m just getting started. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: Congresswoman Ann Wagner
subject: I’m disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are way behind on where we need to be right now

********

Fellow Conservative,

It's Congresswoman Ann Wagner here. I was really disappointed to see that House Republicans were outraised by the Democrats last month, which is why I'm reaching out to everyone flagged as a true patriot.

While Democrats get all their funds from dark money mega-donors, we rely on grassroots patriots like you. That's why it's so crucial for each and every one of the patriots on this list to let us know that they're still standing with Republicans.

Can you chip in just $35 to stand with House Conservatives?

[**CHIP IN NOW**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BgFpqrEjI2fzzhJI3FajxQTV64o_eTz4z6RT2L0kLs_QlAyQ0JFrsv5rV0mN1_CqKg9j2MiZPsXd6vJa1pbXX8OVLec98dYyOFGiA7lpM4ihr3xfJBwapC60QzIQDGir89igaBGZAOm62jBx_MGycgz812xZu4ZhO6Mujm-aK9cB_ihaBpq_B0yREjVNTGy_mfh2UmhgLyTME7sMW1HQMJZ9YbgiBkr328_R9o8vk_xtBUan2jQnldFjtl1fdY2SlPcPEN3TW7JVlXYC3KUOxfxThSMOg8gfuToeIAoE3Mt3YeeS6H3As6A9CHxWXjK3U6U3cWEXVAXpSlltYdQ0JYpmrd4tbKtvMrTMm5rFSA23I6tpgqZn0B-SR9wSlQCmootTiMJc3wozGIP0lrEwvuPC27chlbN3qiC_G7In6MM=&c=DhG2GRRgriUzYPTbNBDprA49yDdiYbQs-Vl8Ra0iGatAPOKj5jc8vA==&ch=vVKS6xc5bYEWYzUbRKK0lw8tS5B_aGh18-QMii5dFVwRrcLG9DZNJw==)

We are way behind on where we need to be, Fellow Conservative. Right now, Nancy Pelosi is doing everything she can to oust conservative patriots like me, and replace them with her hand-picked Socialist allies.

**Democrats are holding on to a razor-thin majority -- just 5 seats need to be flipped from BLUE to RED to defeat Pelosi and take back the House for conservatives.** If you are a dedicated supporter of House Conservatives, I have a mission for you -- [**chip in today to help us FLIP the House.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BgFpqrEjI2fzzhJI3FajxQTV64o_eTz4z6RT2L0kLs_QlAyQ0JFrsv5rV0mN1_CqKg9j2MiZPsXd6vJa1pbXX8OVLec98dYyOFGiA7lpM4ihr3xfJBwapC60QzIQDGir89igaBGZAOm62jBx_MGycgz812xZu4ZhO6Mujm-aK9cB_ihaBpq_B0yREjVNTGy_mfh2UmhgLyTME7sMW1HQMJZ9YbgiBkr328_R9o8vk_xtBUan2jQnldFjtl1fdY2SlPcPEN3TW7JVlXYC3KUOxfxThSMOg8gfuToeIAoE3Mt3YeeS6H3As6A9CHxWXjK3U6U3cWEXVAXpSlltYdQ0JYpmrd4tbKtvMrTMm5rFSA23I6tpgqZn0B-SR9wSlQCmootTiMJc3wozGIP0lrEwvuPC27chlbN3qiC_G7In6MM=&c=DhG2GRRgriUzYPTbNBDprA49yDdiYbQs-Vl8Ra0iGatAPOKj5jc8vA==&ch=vVKS6xc5bYEWYzUbRKK0lw8tS5B_aGh18-QMii5dFVwRrcLG9DZNJw==)

[**TAKE A STAND**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BgFpqrEjI2fzzhJI3FajxQTV64o_eTz4z6RT2L0kLs_QlAyQ0JFrsv5rV0mN1_CqKg9j2MiZPsXd6vJa1pbXX8OVLec98dYyOFGiA7lpM4ihr3xfJBwapC60QzIQDGir89igaBGZAOm62jBx_MGycgz812xZu4ZhO6Mujm-aK9cB_ihaBpq_B0yREjVNTGy_mfh2UmhgLyTME7sMW1HQMJZ9YbgiBkr328_R9o8vk_xtBUan2jQnldFjtl1fdY2SlPcPEN3TW7JVlXYC3KUOxfxThSMOg8gfuToeIAoE3Mt3YeeS6H3As6A9CHxWXjK3U6U3cWEXVAXpSlltYdQ0JYpmrd4tbKtvMrTMm5rFSA23I6tpgqZn0B-SR9wSlQCmootTiMJc3wozGIP0lrEwvuPC27chlbN3qiC_G7In6MM=&c=DhG2GRRgriUzYPTbNBDprA49yDdiYbQs-Vl8Ra0iGatAPOKj5jc8vA==&ch=vVKS6xc5bYEWYzUbRKK0lw8tS5B_aGh18-QMii5dFVwRrcLG9DZNJw==)

The Democrats have no limits on what they'll do to stack the House with Socialists. They raised $12 Million last month to spend attacking Conservatives who just want to put America first; especially the ones in top-targeted districts and special elections coming up. They won't stop until they have full control over politics in Washington.

_**We cannot let them succeed.**_ We need every patriot who reads this email to step up today.

[**TAKE A STAND**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BgFpqrEjI2fzzhJI3FajxQTV64o_eTz4z6RT2L0kLs_QlAyQ0JFrsv5rV0mN1_CqKg9j2MiZPsXd6vJa1pbXX8OVLec98dYyOFGiA7lpM4ihr3xfJBwapC60QzIQDGir89igaBGZAOm62jBx_MGycgz812xZu4ZhO6Mujm-aK9cB_ihaBpq_B0yREjVNTGy_mfh2UmhgLyTME7sMW1HQMJZ9YbgiBkr328_R9o8vk_xtBUan2jQnldFjtl1fdY2SlPcPEN3TW7JVlXYC3KUOxfxThSMOg8gfuToeIAoE3Mt3YeeS6H3As6A9CHxWXjK3U6U3cWEXVAXpSlltYdQ0JYpmrd4tbKtvMrTMm5rFSA23I6tpgqZn0B-SR9wSlQCmootTiMJc3wozGIP0lrEwvuPC27chlbN3qiC_G7In6MM=&c=DhG2GRRgriUzYPTbNBDprA49yDdiYbQs-Vl8Ra0iGatAPOKj5jc8vA==&ch=vVKS6xc5bYEWYzUbRKK0lw8tS5B_aGh18-QMii5dFVwRrcLG9DZNJw==)

Thank you,

Congresswoman Ann Wagner

#
Dear Peter,

Thank you for joining our movement to hold Nicole Malliotakis accountable for her vote to overturn the 2020 election. As [New York City’s first community-based Super PAC](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=d53e3d8ed8&e=07cb4a6a22), we’re going to use the power of the grassroots to help make sure Nicole is voted out in 2022.

If you're on social media, we need you to follow, like and share what we're doing, and to create & share your own content to share using the hashtags #NicoleIsComplicit and #ResignMalliotakis.

---
| [FOLLOW NICPAC ON TWITTER](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=5b353c9239&e=07cb4a6a22 "FOLLOW NICPAC ON TWITTER")
---
| [FOLLOW NICPAC ON FACEBOOK](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=4f97a025f3&e=07cb4a6a22 "FOLLOW NICPAC ON FACEBOOK")
---
| [FOLLOW NICPAC ON INSTAGRAM](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=a3eceba580&e=07cb4a6a22 "FOLLOW NICPAC ON INSTAGRAM")
---
| Then, please like, share, comment on and engage with our posts - and ask your friends to do the same!

Thank you for your support,

Jonathan
The NICPAC Team
---
|
---
| **Look, we can’t do this without you.** Nicole Malliotakis is going to have all the conspiracy theorists sending money her way because she’s one of them. If we want to take back this district and restore civility, [it’s up to us](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=5c8bc3c338&e=07cb4a6a22).

subject: The Cost of Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Kansas is beginning to see the true costs of Pelosi and Biden's economic policy. It NOT good. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

We're seeing the same numbers you are, and it's shocking. **The prices of essential goods and services have skyrocketed** from where they were just one year ago before _**Biden and Pelosi rammed their massive spending plans through Congress. **_
---
| Let's take a look:
* Gas prices have **risen over 70%**
* The cost of lumber is up **more than 300%**
* Used cars are up **over 20%**
* The price of food rising steadily, including essential Kansas products, such as **wheat and beef**
* Energy prices have **risen 25%**
* and _**out of control inflation is hurting Kansans**_

---
| [Rush in $25 to help us Take Back the House](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0546805e04&e=1050d051da "Rush in $25 to help us Take Back the House")
---
| Biden made a promise that nobody making less than $400,000 will pay more in taxes. Well, we have news for him: **Inflation is a tax on everyone.**

Congressman LaTurner needs your help so Republicans can take back the House, and stop Biden's reckless actions that are hurting our economy. Would you be able to help us out with [a donation](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=492e9788f5&e=1050d051da)[ to our campaign?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=70273d09f1&e=1050d051da)

Congressman LaTurner was elected because he promised fiscal responsibility in his [Contract With Kansas](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=78026390b4&e=1050d051da). It's time that Congress lives within its means, _**just like Kansas families do.**_

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---

name: Seth (Ellzey HQ)
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
Just wanted to reach out today

Hey Friend -
I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out today regarding the upcoming must-win Special Election Runoff in Texas. As you know, everything is on the line here, and if we fall behind, there may not be a chance to catch up. Special Elections are tricky and expensive -- and we've seen outside groups spending big in this race.
That's why I was wondering if you'd be willing to chip in just $5 bucks to help us in this must-win race. You can chip in here: [**https://secure.winred.com/jake-ellzey-for-congress/runoff/**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013x4t_WWOqQwQiDYmW2jRu1dbGC4AenU6jdxGp4aHQIlHwelWTdek_mjm4mUqpzhH1bLwgVoYJ6PsEJ_ItVq5NUqNVm9x3ynS_lJS5dPw1mbjv_KSQANJ6ZVX4iO5i5OS8TQ7KRYZjFFNvn1k_ZEWdzW0gErQaVtFrPq1GJhJtBEHs-J3Mub8YLrcRgmxuhnc1-jQ1kiuEQ_qnBLE73h0BuR-wPoKn5oe12JRS_VDvPTSyqcc4PbqgkuBtU3PBDZ0GiVt2VfTD2GGMxJANCL6q6CY9Eaijp0-EZy3SmieTR_RDbWqmTdpqBaPYTwQx95M9A5HA7kjaVly2GuY25bCPOykWyYycMQyv4irHt2eTmKw-LQiERQU7MqkJjJeznsTyH6grlvFklYlJ5qST69fmBQkPvzQIr7taN6i16-aNyEy9Vj_DAii6w==&c=539-Y44VKi4-l7FPcyUayCiUxYOLa7WZDrW-X1ivtvzKFie1sSUQXg==&ch=8PEN0tQ4a-SM3VEJL1Hw7yRmNyZE9TTmzBcG2EKhJOXbUjNIMElDAQ==)
Our conservative candidate, Jake Ellzey, is a retired Navy fighter pilot who can defeat the Pelosi/Biden political machine in Congress. Friend, we hate to have to ask like this, but your support is critical and we have no chance to win this race if we don't get support from grassroots conservatives like you.
Thanks for all you do.
-- Seth with Team Ellzey
_Texas Special Election Runoff_

body:
Susan has defended a woman’s right to choose time and time again.

| | | “A big abortion case could upend ‘Roe’ — and burn the court’s credibility”

_-The Washington Post_
---
As President, Donald Trump appointed a slate of far-right judges to the Supreme Court with the goal of outlawing abortion. Now, Roe v. Wade, a woman’s right to make her own choices about her body, are at critical risk.

Congress can still defend a woman's right to choose. But if Republicans take back the House majority in 2022, they have promised to do all they can to take away the choice away from women and BAN abortion entirely.

In Congress, Susan has defended a woman’s right to choose time and time again, earning her a 100% rating from NARAL. She also represents one of the most competitive districts in Congress. If she loses, Republicans will have an easy path to taking back the House and banning reproductive freedom.

Now, Roe v. Wade, a woman’s right to make her own choices about her body, are at critical risk. Congress can still defend a woman's right to choose. But if Republicans take back the House majority in 2022, they have promised to do all they can to take away the choice away from women and BAN abortion entirely. In Congress, Susan has defended a woman’s right to choose time and time again, earning her a 100% rating from NARAL. She also represents one of the most competitive districts in Congress. Hello, **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution before we close the books on our May fundraising.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797384/287543894/333614831?refcode=MTH_em_20210526_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTFlYzdjNC02NGJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PojGrTM6icOI8RoJTdr6DFlhKWzbFLgmgJI8SJvpsw8=)** But first, I want to take just a little time to share what I’ve been able to get done lately thanks to grassroots support. This month in the Senate we’ve put workers and families first, reinvested in America’s leadership in important technologies, taken steps to start undoing roll backs in critical USPS services, and confirmed nominees like Kristen Clarke, who will restore our American commitment to equality under the law. We’ve also pushed for bold action on climate change. Last week, I led my Senate colleagues in introducing the _Electrifying America’s Future_ resolution to create millions of good-paying jobs for New Mexicans and our whole country, and take on the climate crisis with the urgency it deserves. Off the Senate floor, I’ve been campaigning for Melanie Stansbury, a champion for families and our environment whose race could decide whether Democrats keep the House majority. **Grassroots support is the reason I can do this important work.** Donations to emails like this one help me focus on what I was elected to do — instead of calling big donors for hours every day just to get dollars through the door. And as we approach the end of the month, it’s even more important that lots of folks chip in just a little — $5, $10, and $25 at a time — so I can keep up this work for the people. **So, here’s that ask I mentioned: Will you chip in whatever amount you can to fuel our work ahead?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797385/287543895/333614831?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210526_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTFlYzdjNC02NGJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PojGrTM6icOI8RoJTdr6DFlhKWzbFLgmgJI8SJvpsw8=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797386/287543897/333614831?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210526_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTFlYzdjNC02NGJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PojGrTM6icOI8RoJTdr6DFlhKWzbFLgmgJI8SJvpsw8=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: They are destroying our party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
NO to the Dem anti-Trump Commission! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8619074fa9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Republicans will never achieve our policy goals until we stick together and fight as hard as the Dems do. That's just a fact!

I WILL fight, as I have my whole life!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fc4769a3e0&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician. I nearly shocked the political world by coming close to beating him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

You know the reason I got more votes in my district than any Republican ever had? **_I never backed down, and never gave an inch! I took it right to the Dems._**

Apparently, the RINOs in Congress didn't get the message- including some from here in Florida:

_Thirty-five House Republicans on Wednesday voted in favor of a bill to establish a commission to investigate the January 6 attack on the Capitol.

Former President Donald Trump this week urged Republican lawmakers to oppose it, saying in a statement: "**Republicans must get much tougher and much smarter, and stop being used by the Radical Left.** "

The result underscores the ongoing division within the GOP over Trump's role in and influence over the party's direction, with many Republicans who had criticized the former president for his role in the events of January 6 - including Rep. Liz Cheney - breaking ranks to vote in favor of establishing a commission.

The bill passed by a vote of 252-175 and was opposed by GOP leadership, Insider's Grace Panetta and Charles Davis reported._

So, this bill was SO bad, that even McCarthy and McConnell opposed it.

The bill begins:

_To investigate and report upon the facts and causes relating to the January 6, 2021, domestic terrorist attack upon the United States Capitol Complex (hereafter referred to as the ‘‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’’)..._

So, let's get this straight. _To the Dems and the RINOs, a couple of guys from Duck Dynasty and some guy in a buffalo bikini, all unarmed, constitute a "Domestic Terrorist Attack"_... but ACTUAL armed rioters burning and looting thousands of homes and businesses, killing dozens of innocent people, across dozens of cities, that's just fine and dandy?

When Congress excuses some kinds of political violence and tarnishes others, that's a good sign their motivation is political, not truth.

_I'm ashamed and angry that ANY Republicans, much less Floridians (Carlos Gimenez and Maria Salazar) voted for this drivel._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b862ebcf59&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**I've been to actual warzones. I've seen an ACTUAL insurrection. You can't have an insurrection without guns. Such an event is usually called a "protest", which is what this was.**__

Look, I don't want to excuse political violence. But I especially don't want to excuse some types and not others. Either violence to influence politics is ok for everyone or ok for no one.

And the "truth commission" of the Dems reeks of political persecution. Already we have seen Constitutional rights abridged by the FBI in their overzealous prosecution of this situation.

For Republicans, this was a "show and tell" moment. We needed to be together to stop this political persecution of our own base. **Instead some woke Republicans joined the Dems, and that's not acceptable. **

**Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We have to assume that any Republicans that vote with the Dems, support their radical agenda. **

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the RINOs from day one!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job!_

I want to go defend America, like I have always done. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8d4a5ec895&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we (the Patriots, because the RINOs are worthless) need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our innocent citizens from political persecution!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8504f05775&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8b0009fb90&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c706ea4fb5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=49f914488f&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=69588312b2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=69588312b2).
