name: Sharice Davids
subject: I’m proud to endorse Malcolm’s historic campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our country needs bold leaders who aren't afraid to take on tough fights and deliver real progress for working families.
#

Friend,
Our country needs bold leaders who aren't afraid to take on tough fights and deliver real progress for working families.
That's why I'm proud to endorse Malcolm Kenyatta and his historic campaign to represent Pennsylvania in the United States Senate.
**Malcolm is a powerful voice for working people who is going to make history as the first openly LGBTQ+ person of color to serve in the U.S. Senate.**
[It's time for a new generation of leadership with bold voices like Malcolm's at the forefront. If you agree, please consider making a contribution to power his historic campaign today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797776/287545771/-347207331?refcode2=256cc382-65be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYzM4Mi02NWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buI2LnkRrKSQtmrIDS4M4KkbHXXe084Ra6nKGZiBCX4=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797779/287545773/-347207331?refcode2=256cc382-65be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYzM4Mi02NWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buI2LnkRrKSQtmrIDS4M4KkbHXXe084Ra6nKGZiBCX4=)**
For too long, LGBTQ+ candidates of color have been underestimated — only to win decisive victories and deliver incredible progress for the people they represent.
In 2018, people didn't think that a lesbian Native American woman like me could win in a tough district in Kansas.
But I had an incredible team of grassroots supporters standing with me, and we proved them wrong. Now, I’m a Member of Congress, and I spend my days fighting for the people who fought for me.
I'm confident Malcolm can prove the doubters wrong, too — as long as folks like you help show he has a huge coalition of support behind his campaign for Senate.
[Will you be a part of the work Malcolm's team is doing to build incredible momentum behind his historic candidacy? Just $3 from you today will be a big help in giving Pennsylvania's working families a bold voice who will fight for them in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797780/287545775/-347207331?refcode2=256cc382-65be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYzM4Mi02NWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buI2LnkRrKSQtmrIDS4M4KkbHXXe084Ra6nKGZiBCX4=)
This campaign is funded by lots of people giving small donations. That's why we set a goal of 3,000 donations before this monthly deadline. So please, if you’re able:
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797781/287545777/-347207331?refcode2=256cc382-65be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYzM4Mi02NWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buI2LnkRrKSQtmrIDS4M4KkbHXXe084Ra6nKGZiBCX4=)**
Thank you,
Sharice Davids
United States Representative, KS-03
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29797782/287545778/-347207331?refcode2=256cc382-65be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210526-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYzM4Mi02NWJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buI2LnkRrKSQtmrIDS4M4KkbHXXe084Ra6nKGZiBCX4=)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: BLM Indoctrination in our Schools
body:
I'm not easily shocked, but when I visited my local Palm Beach County School District website and saw their latest "educational content," I was like "whoa!"
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kQtt763vEv8ZxAkuGGmshkKQ/ppMatlfywCXVEZGbdFdIpA)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kQtt763vEv8ZxAkuGGmshkKQ/ppMatlfywCXVEZGbdFdIpA) I'm not easily shocked, but when I visited my local Palm Beach County School District website and saw their latest "educational content," I was like "whoa!"

On the site was a link to videos and course materials about Black Lives Matter, followed by, "As a result of living through a critical time in the nation's history, young activists used their voices and organized for change."

But once I clicked through, the top educational tool was a video . . . a cartoon for elementary school students that hyped "institutional racism" and glossed over the riots and looting that caused billions in damages to our communities.

Here's what the cartoon character, Nat, had to say about that: "_Though if you 've been watching the news, you might think it's all been riots. News and social media tend to highlight what's most sensational: unusual, exciting, or scary stuff that gets people to watch._"

Nat then called on the children watching the video to create, "_creative tension_ " in their communities to make leaders "_a little uneasy_."

This curriculum is being taught to our school children with the intent of motivating them to join an organization that literally burned down and occupied parts of our cities in the last year!

We need members of Congress who would move to pull funding for any school that attempts to indoctrinate children with this garbage!

[Help me get to Washington by supporting my run for Congress today.](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kQtt763vEv8ZxAkuGGmshkKQ/ppMatlfywCXVEZGbdFdIpA)

Have you had enough yet?

Over 100 monuments around the nation have been destroyed or taken down since the George Floyd riots began - BLM terrorists are working hard to erase American history and replace it with their revisions and Critical Race Theory.

And what does Nancy Pelosi and her "Squad" in Congress do? They cheer it on and fund it while very few stand up to this insanity.

Help me stand in Congress to represent Americans who have had enough! [Donate today to help me win.](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kQtt763vEv8ZxAkuGGmshkKQ/ppMatlfywCXVEZGbdFdIpA)

Thank you for all that you do, and for all that you believe in.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Fox News Op-Ed: The China Threat Is Real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Here is a portion of the op-ed, I hope you’ll give it a read: [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b3a420f3f3d74d289e6f477844e011bd&_e=Pqdu1WveB5prVPoJ3Lq5jJX76upFTNFmUSEMxljHyNLasQlk3HE7TW5esfcv0c9vTbOIf3RW8M6VpyRaHEcExukKxBY4QeBkJoIiU8n99GwZbadeuMU2n0XPYrrmQdj0DAKWahhMrYq6Y3ll1Rzucd77LBTwQ8QSlnJwuFOFdz211Phc98Ps4n-OI_HrorX1iz3DxbQAgJblTowHQ2Q-cJr5LCCUMNTHqb-v5_ihA3eCwVMFqpIEGUf8_5Eox_0ccjL04U0i1IV47EvqmYGxM77w2pmB-8lFlFUTBbZb-cWDNz1gLIZGZ3BUp9ZAeZHE3epaSavO4q52WtlgpAnq1VXz9Z7J7wTLw0r3IwwRB1o0nhzZ_NUjTT0Lk9CoBpzmyVNyhczAF-R4nZl6k-OaUg%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Every day, the threat China poses to America and the free world, grows.

Joe Biden, “The Squad,” and the rest of the Democrat Party has made a point to bow down to the Chinese Communist Party at every turn.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!**

Just this week, a Hollywood celebrity was forced to issue an apology to China, **IN CHINESE.** His crime? Recognizing that Taiwan is a country.

I penned an op-ed for Fox News titled, _[**The China threat is real and big business is a sellout. Here's what Congress must do now**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b3a420f3f3d74d289e6f477844e011bd&_e=Pqdu1WveB5prVPoJ3Lq5jJX76upFTNFmUSEMxljHyNLasQlk3HE7TW5esfcv0c9vTbOIf3RW8M6VpyRaHEcExukKxBY4QeBkJoIiU8n99GwZbadeuMU2n0XPYrrmQdj0DAKWahhMrYq6Y3ll1Rzucd77LBTwQ8QSlnJwuFOFdz211Phc98Ps4n-OI_HrorX17I7Y5bY_p_TFjrPHqvTaSOMSLuXn_PNjOZYjCTLsNKeJS4PAfggCAxr9RHRmNn3KLy79buB_-tKcq3c9oK2j3xmQPai0cZajWSUKZkroQUbrrPhj1eIdA2uZ6vJbaT-8wgzbr78vw1WL5_W5odxjFOoH5gv-tS4mBmRSu9TJnvvtwJBkfqYrv0o4poaagQ6iIldRDLlkSNi29fBf7F_SuQ%3D%3D). _

clean_body: If they take Cathy's seat, it's all over. Republicans will never have a Majority again. So, I'm writing to you today because that's a scenario we cannot let happen. Friend & Fellow Republican, I really hope you 'll take a few minutes to read this email because what I have to tell you is CRITICAL to America's future. As you read this, Ultra-progressives across the nation are working nonstop to "expand their House majority". They're locking on specific states right now and they are zeroing in on Washington Districts in an effort to gain complete control. If they take Cathy 's seat, it's all over. Republicans will never have a Majority again. == A leader in combating the abuse of power by Big Tech and Liberal Media companies; A strong Conservative woman who is a threat to a demographic the Left so desperately needs to enact their ultra-progressive agenda-need I go on? Losing ANY seats to Democrats will impact you and your family because of the outcome it will have on Conservative values in the House of Representatives. The balance of the House hangs on a few races, and it's imperative we keep Washington RED. == == Our future is on the line. Let's take a stand today to fight for it! name: MarkKelly.com
subject: A quick rundown of the final days before our May fundraising deadline (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_May Fundraising Deadline_**
**Contribution Goal:** 50,000
**Deadline Day:** May 31st
**Suggested Donation:** $3
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210526-1-15&t=1&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf)**
Friends —
We have our May fundraising deadline coming up on Monday. Here’s a quick rundown of the days ahead:
1. Our goal is to get **50,000 contributions** by then.
2. So we need to keep up the pace, we only have 5 days to get it done, so we’re coming directly to you and asking for your support.

Our goal is based on the number of people donating — not a dollar amount, because your contribution is more important than the amount you can give.
And usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about hitting our goal. But One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, recently dropped a **_six-figure ad buy_** in Arizona attacking Mark.
**You can see how important your support is to holding this seat, which is why today we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 50,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210526-1-15&t=2&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210526-1-15&t=3&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210526-1-15&t=4&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210526-1-15&t=5&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210526-1-15&t=6&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210526-1-15&t=7&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210526-1-15&t=8&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf)
---|---
We are going to hold this seat because people like you believed in our campaign from the start.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210526-1-15&t=9&refcode2=673_6688874_4Gk-Uf&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=10&akid=673%2E6688874%2E4Gk-Uf).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Peter,

I am facing my FIRST fundraising deadline since launching my campaign just weeks ago, and it’s a big one. [**What we do between now and midnight May 31 st will set the tone for our campaign and our fight to take back the House.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f0feade05df04863b6ad019bfc36581d&_e=xvWlvrtYi4F7wwsDUGJRi8BoeaaIPiAYFWg8Tk5BNrOe_iYowNrH0kZz1BThu3ALTWBEre9M8Sqp8hhTVALHoWz2tSskt2q8zlZ5esOZK3Z81qgSyLf5M7cCyx2KF1Jhv9PhqeD1cvUGVatPnJM2dLo19HRCw9UqslOjADCxCUQzU2b7ztJHzsn_szeE7QI5Hwvgk98VLWZk-ra9x2pZ3hbS8PWmUAbWHs9DF2wxjsoDQuicH5__63ljckdA0fnAIbX-BfrR9NZDgQ-oGuIi0yoP3e8RAvecFT76vl5CAta35vRdTvYC82tJji94UuYg0HuHfkXD_XyO7bXApac_nfBnrjsiqys1bgFLudkJWrgpaFl5bPO28SWsZfSLrevsAvskOLv4HpAGO4yiJie9RnKR4s0PrsQSMGW1IBAYqNW1k8vc-47RmFxeb4DVQrSh)

I launched my campaign more than one month into the second quarter, which means I have had to play catchup in the fundraising department.

To crush this quarter, we’ve got to stay on track. **Right now, we’re still $18,635 short this month,** [**but if every grassroots conservative pitches in $10 or more, we’ll be able to make up the difference.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f0feade05df04863b6ad019bfc36581d&_e=xvWlvrtYi4F7wwsDUGJRi8BoeaaIPiAYFWg8Tk5BNrOe_iYowNrH0kZz1BThu3ALTWBEre9M8Sqp8hhTVALHoWz2tSskt2q8zlZ5esOZK3Z81qgSyLf5M7cCyx2KF1Jhv9PhqeD1cvUGVatPnJM2dLo19HRCw9UqslOjADCxCUQzU2b7ztJHzsn_szeE7QI5Hwvgk98VLWZk-ra9x2pZ3hbS8PWmUAbWHs9DF2wxjsqOyj7sZQvWW70kgmUwdNuVcEg8ZGdd1k3A49B7ncyoSI9K8oTWTvevbro3pSr4ahwdkC-VO0rfWWODKPClzWAQosTLbeWjffLWzbFUX9MjfhhXJjOlzCpWUJoOVvvbQPpF1G9HeExrjGy3_gqOdPHNbnORKsSqGQ4X6uwlyFH5dX3jGe8TIqfxZX4Q4MMKUViiQYdTH8xYXtVc-FmktWO9)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29800864/287556119/602283465?refcode=20210526_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UzYmRkOS02ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JatSSKAuQjxwaKIzj2aU7cc61iYl1sbDrs-65o8iReo=) Friends, we’re facing a big end-of-month deadline, and I’m about to ask you to [**split a $6 donation**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29800865/287556120/602283465?refcode=20210526_TR_split&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UzYmRkOS02ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JatSSKAuQjxwaKIzj2aU7cc61iYl1sbDrs-65o8iReo=) between my grassroots Senate campaign and Seth Moulton’s campaign. But first, a few facts about my race:
1. **Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim Democratic Senate majority.** With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single battleground race like this one.

2. **National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race.** One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a Super PAC.

3. **I have multiple Republican opponents—not one of them is looking out for the working class.** We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind.

4. **We’re just 5 days away from our May deadline, and we need to post strong fundraising numbers.** Political pundits (and our opponents) will use our report to see if we have what it takes to flip this seat blue.

[**So, here it is: will you chip in a split donation of just $6 to help Seth Moulton and me fight to end Republican obstruction and deliver for the American people?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29800866/287556121/602283465?refcode=20210520_TR_split&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UzYmRkOS02ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JatSSKAuQjxwaKIzj2aU7cc61iYl1sbDrs-65o8iReo=) [Donate $6](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29800867/287556122/-1665179247?refcode=20210526_TR_split&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UzYmRkOS02ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JatSSKAuQjxwaKIzj2aU7cc61iYl1sbDrs-65o8iReo=) [Other amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29800868/287556123/-1665179247?refcode=20210526_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2UzYmRkOS02ZmJlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JatSSKAuQjxwaKIzj2aU7cc61iYl1sbDrs-65o8iReo=)

But first, a few facts about my race: 1. Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim Democratic Senate majority. With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single battleground race like this one. 2. National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race. One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a Super PAC. 3. I have multiple Republican opponents—not one of them is looking out for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind. 4. We’re just 5 days away from our May deadline, and we need to post strong fundraising numbers. Political pundits (and our opponents) will use our report to see if we have what it takes to flip this seat blue. = = = Together, I know we can pull this off. -Tim If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:
Gavin Newsom must be held accountable. Peter, Protecting California’s citizens does not appear to be important to Gavin Newsom. With massive swaths of leftists demanding a “defund the police movement,” Newsom has clearly caved to their wildest dreams. **A glaring new finding just revealed that 14,000 sexual assault exams, commonly referred to as “rape kits” remained sitting on the shelves gathering dust.** However, at the same time, Newsom continues to tout a “massive budget surplus.” If he has all this extra money available... Why is he not choosing to protect California citizens? Political behavior like this is why so many people are leaving California. Peter, Newsom doesn’t care about the safety of you or your loved ones. Newsom’s behavior matches those that are in the same camp as him: coastal elites.**[Earlier in the year when there were massive riots across the country with billions of dollars of property destroyed, Kamala Harris raised funds for the bail of those arrested. ](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=3446bcfd512b454ba67093834ea035b1&_e=Z4pXH3oQq49LNkt1CoLCYjjcwhTz4pq-rP2ubA3uMU5q3yDrN7dVqgTqCrnYo8rkpDiO3n7JfWH-JUOPzgI3v8WC8MDPZelcDNit3bAsdcqc0kMNg0ebIgkzjcfLIOCXn12kYrLiF4a4NR2aaMd9DbUM6A2tLWxK-c0EzZrChJ3Qim_PqhVRzw9NQcSTST1TaBUGxZpYMHYPXAK4v2V-0OrQyCDtkaz5EcT2t7wOF0BfY3zS0oq-ioxfLdqUjkGzaHOE0cbb1IxudgB5jCmKPCc2WcRTO7aQEMeG4v2Lt2EhnIpRLahZGc4a-TvDS_FI4excozni1dOfhxgDb379QIeHdlOIbPR78vnhy6GnrPG_OUPNzz3KfPdQg0pj-XtQ3GCJThojJOWNGkfAk2pqhZJM0W3FJdVoagh3J6WQhEBZ8mjuag69wIbXazqHMSe9)** Newsom and the Democratic elites don’t side with you, Peter. They side with the criminals. **So Peter, I have one very simple question:** **[Do you support defunding the police?](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=3446bcfd512b454ba67093834ea035b1&_e=Z4pXH3oQq49LNkt1CoLCYjjcwhTz4pq-rP2ubA3uMU5q3yDrN7dVqgTqCrnYo8rkpDiO3n7JfWH-JUOPzgI3v8WC8MDPZelcDNit3bAsdcqc0kMNg0ebIgkzjcfLIOCXn12kYrLiF4a4NR2aaMd9DbUM6A2tLWxK-c0EzZrChJ3Qim_PqhVRzw9NQcSTST1TaBUGxZpYMHYPXAK4v2V-0IP-gF8Xg4zUaLQf1pQke6CjvXycQnYeRQDmmAdqykorA5K6PqeGvoqe7FrKPXoJ8QQWApHBJkQV1-VgjRUKsoMUvsHYbEvjh96GCdR3leqBKCHOmvvkDlGMqj-DWqt8MHy-qPTcLTQA1g63r9s2bIjhknJPnkUxDXtxx9GFCLrS77jtfoN-nTg93JY3Hwb3oRFDsJTGZ5p55N-boTxC4DSa8nJoa3l-SPWty8D4YGoa)** [**YES**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=3446bcfd512b454ba67093834ea035b1&_e=Z4pXH3oQq49LNkt1CoLCYjjcwhTz4pq-rP2ubA3uMU5q3yDrN7dVqgTqCrnYo8rkpDiO3n7JfWH-JUOPzgI3v8WC8MDPZelcDNit3bAsdcqc0kMNg0ebIgkzjcfLIOCXn12kYrLiF4a4NR2aaMd9DbUM6A2tLWxK-c0EzZrChJ3Qim_PqhVRzw9NQcSTST1TaBUGxZpYMHYPXAK4v2V-0NbCCQpIqXdLyApbNxKWaieBnlyo03hw9-ZVd4wKyjOJVq6QNTpw00i35ZmLW4PBcEsAG8JulazIyhx10cZj92ZIRq0QrmlCM4ES5NZpWJ-B3Spjn4SGVUCRWzbSY8LEdovFmEgDyMEpHyGg46QxMkb7DgRJbbliYuPciTJIQP_XTPEaQXJggjvM7lsGU7knV2W7Og714NQVTgoQg2XKsyXiVixFhRivFqX9JLakBu7F) [**NO**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=3446bcfd512b454ba67093834ea035b1&_e=Z4pXH3oQq49LNkt1CoLCYjjcwhTz4pq-rP2ubA3uMU5q3yDrN7dVqgTqCrnYo8rkpDiO3n7JfWH-JUOPzgI3v8WC8MDPZelcDNit3bAsdcqc0kMNg0ebIgkzjcfLIOCXn12kYrLiF4a4NR2aaMd9DbUM6A2tLWxK-c0EzZrChJ3Qim_PqhVRzw9NQcSTST1TaBUGxZpYMHYPXAK4v2V-0KwsJTQ_9hp6KUoovRGbbd-XZoLweOwnGBXgtyxnxbkxNjxoIgwNNWdMCRtDPcIWjyVCDKfG2vc2CXf58m7nqtTXATwXGyxcah0gstjRh4hfVZIFXnBfhqbfXLLIlDtJTuEZj9oI33Hrzdcn-xdfUuCZ5rlZnwIr747PxIefYPeb1fEpz1SrTZiWxLKvGq-gn4XXSu3sOhME2QzN7GNFrsLtGJjKvjpUFfHORIjgWY8v) Your opinion means a lot to me, Peter. **[I want to help protect you and your family, but I need to know where you stand first. body:

Dear Supporter,
As May comes to an end, the data shows that Liberals’ fundraising numbers are getting close to surpassing ours.

Democrats in Washington are pumping money into Mississippi Liberals’ pockets! More Democrat money in our state means more support is being funneled to Democrat candidates across Mississippi.

**In order to stay on top, our team has set a fundraising goal to raise $8,000 before May 31st!**

**Can we count on you to help us make sure Liberals don’t out-fundraise us? **

_**We need your support to keep Mississippi RED!**_
[**Donate _HERE_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=4e7eb825133c465b8a0a82ab42036f5b&_e=RPyFu-6ldDQAbipIhnBIs24nATJjTaSPU0B0KytjSccHXuq1O7AirpA48jXQY6Pq1GMFOfylDJTZjjBA0sIE-ELLFof6VsdiC9iwD4IJTo0Jo9pTWl4vmwQtGES4SxZlMIP-F1unha5OoIw7Z4pQrD1EB57hOn0KrX-8Zru6aj2oK0SsFaA5vowGu956R0TcfH_Y46amIa8-HVyJfLkNW5bN-qPERvanvMq6Zer4ulHPflag4a2HqrfjXo6YCTtK1rJI_aG8x9o-_ipWjZ_71AtY9LTHkT51zW92MAY7uMXNevC7NOcAlIBba-ojWeicMIHuxmerC1COW9YXxeFKJGI-sWMiuqmRwmS5ksd6X0tpFK74wTZEAhaGmJc1kZDzpY_e8tGbLw7AHIwuAvjvDw%3D%3D)

name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Our moral movement is growing strong. I can feel it in my heart — but we must keep up the momentum in order to have a fighting chance in this race.
#
I’m so excited, y’all!
Since launching our historic campaign for the U.S. Senate, we’ve received an outpouring of support from folks like you who are ready to shake up the status quo and transform politics as we know it.
Our moral movement is growing strong. I can feel it in my heart — but we must keep up the momentum in order to have a fighting chance in this race.
That’s why we’ve set a $7,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to help fund our *huge* summer of action to talk to voters directly in all 100 counties in North Carolina.
**We’re running behind on our goal, so I’m putting this grassroots team up to the challenge:**
[**Will you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to help me reach our $7,000 goal by May 31? Every donation helps us fund our critical on-the-ground organizing efforts to reach as many people as possible this summer.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1751?refcode=em20210526-115&t=20&akid=115%2E3698%2EjgXJwv)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1751?refcode=em20210526-115&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=115%2E3698%2EjgXJwv)**
The truth is that we’re counting on supporters like you to fuel our work to organize a massive, diverse, working-class coalition in every county across North Carolina.
I vowed not to accept corporate PAC money. Not a single penny. And even though it makes fundraising more challenging, I have faith in our grassroots team.
[**So, I’m personally asking: Will you make a $5 contribution to help us spread our message for progress in all 100 counties and build an unstoppable movement for change.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1751?refcode=em20210526-115&t=22&akid=115%2E3698%2EjgXJwv)
From the bottom of my heart, thank you so much for your support.
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210526-115-footer&t=23&refcode2=115_3698_jgXJwv&akid=115%2E3698%2EjgXJwv)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=115%2E3698%2EjgXJwv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=115%2E3698%2EjgXJwv)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Since launching our historic campaign for the U.S. Senate, we’ve received an outpouring of support from folks like you who are ready to shake up the status quo and transform politics as we know it. Our moral movement is growing strong. I can feel it in my heart — but we must keep up the momentum in order to have a fighting chance in this race. That’s why we’ve set a $7,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to help fund our huge summer of action to talk to voters directly in all 100 counties in North Carolina. We’re running behind on our goal, so I’m putting this grassroots team up to the challenge: The truth is that we’re counting on supporters like you to fuel our work to organize a massive, diverse, working-class coalition in every county across North Carolina. I vowed not to accept corporate PAC money. Not a single penny. And even though it makes fundraising more challenging, I have faith in our grassroots team. From the bottom of my heart, thank you so much for your support. Erica Erica Smith for U.S. Senate Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Congress’s VIP Air Marshal Program Canceled after Maxine Waters Debacle
body:
A scandal-plagued “VIP” program that provided members of Congress with Federal Air Marshals (FAM) often yanked from high-risk fights has been canceled after Judicial Watch exposed it earlier this month.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 26, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55774&L=24991&F=H&)
---
# [Congress’s VIP Air Marshal Program Canceled after Maxine Waters Debacle](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55774&L=24991&F=H&)
A scandal-plagued “VIP” program that provided members of Congress with Federal Air Marshals (FAM) often yanked from high-risk fights has been canceled after Judicial Watch exposed it earlier this month. As a result, hundreds of FAM are sitting idly at airports around the U.S. because the “VIP missions have stopped,” according to a federal law enforcement source with firsthand knowledge of the situation. A veteran air marshal who asked not to be identified said “the Washington Field Office in Washington D.C. was almost exclusively dedicated to VIP services for Congress.” Another longtime FAM told Judicial Watch he was deployed on several VIP missions with low-profile members of Congress. He said so many FAM were on standby for the VIP congressional program that now he and many of his colleagues are “sitting around the airport waiting for a mission.”
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55774&L=24991&F=H&)

(The short version.) It’s the double-speak - they say one thing and do another so common with politicians. And let me tell you, friend, it’s at an all time high. We’ve got:
* an infrastructure bill that doesn’t actually include money for infrastructure
* a Vice President in charge of the border crisis who refuses to visit the border
* and a top doctor who is more concerned with Sunday media appearances than the health of the nation

It’s unacceptable - and it’s what I’m working to change in Congress. clean_body: With my end-of-month fundraising deadline just days away, I need to raise just $12,000 to send a message to Washington that we’re tired of these same Friend, let me tell you what people hate about Washington. (The short version.) It’s the double-speak - they say one thing and do another so common with politicians. And let me tell you, friend, it’s at an all time high. We’ve got: an infrastructure bill that doesn’t actually include money for infrastructure a Vice President in charge of the border crisis who refuses to visit the border and a top doctor who is more concerned with Sunday media appearances than the health of the nation It’s unacceptable - and it’s what I’m working to change in Congress. With my end-of-month fundraising deadline just days away, I need to raise just $12,000 to send a message to Washington that we’re tired of these same old tricks. Can you chip in now to help me reach this goal? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Friend, when I ran for Congress I made a promise to be a new type of Nancy in Washington. I pledged to get results, instead of falling in line with the Washington status quo. And whoa, let me tell you... Washington doesn’t like that very much! They are resisting me at every turn. They want nothing more than to continue with their excessive regulation, big-spending hand-outs, and bloated bills that do more for politicians than they do for the people. But I’m taking on the hypocrisy, the partisan politics, and the do-nothing lawmakers to make Washington work FOR YOU. That doesn’t always make me popular - but that doesn’t bother me, friend. I’m not there to make friends, I’m there to get results. Together, we’ve made huge progress but we’ve got to keep it up to continue our efforts. So please, join me now by contributing to our end-of-month fundraising goal:** I’m here to keep reminding Washington -- I was sent here to represent you, the people. Friend,

It’s been an incredible past couple of weeks here in Indiana.

I’m beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together during the legislative session –– and I can say with complete confidence that I’ve never been more excited, optimistic, and ready for what’s in store for Indiana’s future.

The new state budget addresses a number of key priorities:
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4cd521b120ae4484a2b4c027b54c6d24&_e=LqA7iWN2LqkbusKQecs0OQQTkCD3z9ZxsowQ0WAunkmS2FgewCLCrTzzetn5ZApqw2caOwR-5GULxfJVFHl4T6VojaVz7ceZkYPOUzWVk5uUq3VIyTWzShAxwr3UWjcqxSagzqmIhUaCQ3NZB0bGT7OVgeTLq2oMfVDu4gPpk4lrN2rTGJvokgObeywKjBBo4QErT-H4xsSsCjxwN2T4nPIRDF8twRW5Xzf5gdTTL5uPba2nJjjEPtviIjM0ZatYhUN_SRbx4lSyW0qhEknYURY3XlzIXyMxXhGAcHLOBsOBOYVK3xsFgx-P4KfoAOMkYPZHaHuQlfytltUjrPgUiHFusBcDblKb3QJR0zG1f3jwAbgwX6ziSX9EZyH6owKgnWHg7pkV1j7VubrWa8h3YOO8tDXyYLXDQ-rgcIvtebmP15IVj4u7UMnciXLM0ClPPyoB475yNv3BHfegEzjmSEDUjV1pBMIWrxlqanUas2M%3D)
In light of 2020, we knew that steps needed to be taken to modernize law enforcement practices and strengthen Hoosier health. Both parties in both chambers worked hard to deliver these changes –– proving that Indiana isn’t just a state that works — _we’re a state that works together.__
__
_And we’re committed to providing good government service and delivering results to Hoosiers all across Indiana.

Here’s how we’re getting the job done:

**Improving Law Enforcement for Hoosiers**

✔️ Invests $70M to enhance law enforcement and modernize the Indiana Law Enforcement Academy.
✔️ Provided $30M to outfit officers across the state with body cameras.
✔️ Established de-escalation training for officers.
✔️ Investing additional resources to modernize and update several Indiana State Police posts and National Guard Armories.

**Improving the Quality of Hoosier Health**

✔️ Invested another $100M to fund mental health initiatives.
✔️ Invested $50M for the Health Issues and Challenges grant program.
✔️ Permanently extended telehealth services.
✔️ Funding all-payer claims database, giving Hoosiers realistic expectations of healthcare costs.

With many of these programs up and running, we’re already seeing a return on these investments –– and they’ll continue to pay dividends for Hoosiers for years to come.

**Friend, before you go, will you take a second to share this message with your friends and family on social media?**
[**Share on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4cd521b120ae4484a2b4c027b54c6d24&_e=LqA7iWN2LqkbusKQecs0OQQTkCD3z9ZxsowQ0WAunkmS2FgewCLCrTzzetn5ZApqw2caOwR-5GULxfJVFHl4T6VojaVz7ceZkYPOUzWVk5uUq3VIyTWzShAxwr3UWjcqxSagzqmIhUaCQ3NZB0bGT7OVgeTLq2oMfVDu4gPpk4lrN2rTGJvokgObeywKjBBo4QErT-H4xsSsCjxwN2T4nPIRDF8twRW5Xzf5gdTTL5uPba2nJjjEPtviIjM0ZatYhUN_SRbx4lSyW0qhEknYUanY3gFWOEIrgpCg4C7i_70ti6nOObsdP0zuCUz80PZ3AEs_EbZYKPV3FLKciIE4o8s4eZZhoZgbLF280jKAa_FKvoHQcUOzj1w7MP2PUfVmhnWw6UdU5eQtN8qV32kef5ozYTu6ja51UVKzPvJ2QvbjT27SSQRdoSuNKi-IolxqQFCFWMrTxxBsMLRE_tErkEM8Qtr-Rsgsfs-3UC3ArdU%3D)
[**Share on Twitter**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=4cd521b120ae4484a2b4c027b54c6d24&_e=LqA7iWN2LqkbusKQecs0OUkAWIW0IywmYTUyzvdek8A0tCYneJ7siXzTjNp1-uwytZSJBAZUAZsOhtZKVnM45b4x_F20SFk-CNcviEmfKziat4wg01GlWple_2lNqH5-2orLrXZMdhsBd3RehUKi1Nv1WmH1qJy5lJ73VN1CyeQIkVH2EyipCv4xiVOAZ3kFEwF7FZctT99_0VTOFVfFPdLwImhYK5QePlJEV6v8G1X5KAgwZCAKWyYsjHH4Badni-j0vrbqLKqM09d3VM9H750UCRcZCQugMHvd9yCkTWKMcWJ0q2P6EMUkxsnluQ92Xs1t1RlEIUWFuDwi6LTS13wvJfxClKsvw9ie1Ld_JOORId-Fzpq3ns1BxQmcx-KWN_a9JtBDj2F7HZdm7W_Vjz1sHkDeQY09qfY5lNU0ngHnb-CatgIEkEd0k_3mDaBB_8g8FND8Vrfhp8ZfgqW3r9ejvkKFq6bsAMNhwn5BiyNyJSVfiVbCyCa967j6M4ah)
Thank you,

Our Live Free or Die, Income Tax Free Status under attack by National Democrats

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/1/01000179aa745376-e019c3aa-fe64-42a1-9266-82eaee2a91be-000000/mOab0F11z2w6X_B0KRIbcPBMEzY=216)

| | Derek,

Joe Biden and the National Democrats are looking to subject Granite Staters to out-of-state Income Taxes _**even**_ **_when they work from home in New Hampshire!_**

This is just the latest indication that National Democrats will do whatever they can to increase our taxes and support Blue States while punishing Red States.

**We need to fight back** \- it all starts at the local level and **Governor Chris Sununu** has been leading the fight for Granite Staters against the Democrats. **Our first major Finance Deadline is coming up soon** and [we need to show the nation that New Hampshire Republicans are ready to fight back and expand our State House Majorities and keep the Corner Office in 2022.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/2/01000179aa745376-e019c3aa-fe64-42a1-9266-82eaee2a91be-000000/huMlSCE6zL2QOb1oDg6dlmtRLuA=216)

Friend,

President Biden keeps putting America Last:

❌ **He stopped the Keystone pipeline and made us less energy independent**

❌ **He re-entered the Paris Accord and gave MAJOR concessions to China**

❌ **He gave away America’s vaccine intellectual property FOR FREE**

President Biden’s genius plan to fight climate change is to...cede our energy security to Russia and Saudi Arabia by canceling the Keystone pipeline?

Then he waives sanctions on Russia’s pipeline to let them build it? Every day, Joe Biden is proving that the era of prioritizing America over other countries is finished.
**[THIS IS WHY WE NEED TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE IN 2022!](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=64178fe1a7e245a1a1f91c085750ef05&_e=nJlbJEZbDJyn2EMjANAtthnjrp-PFff1dxdIEd4fclvdVfJiCStT_yksNTkFKmYnLo-OXLJ4FR6E7nvjM11XEXl_U1Xcsl8RTPrv9BRGJ6SZ97TWH2ngMjK8WC7F-3Hc134TPvadDmHyU7-7NwGPFwPIv1l71q72y9SnoaH5koYJ5IawzWq0NqloVFsw0hUni_a77bMXW00ubbS5XCbYPh7pCKf6dvJfSHTQp_q2yUqfqNM2IEF5Cg378MnpNwC2DrWo17n5lTQiBHe__Exlt0-PJi7AtcJWLd2ySMbLWVOaQX-2uKEWAHNcAe9YCBDOPVPexyEDlt78KCPBuD2fJYYHIPH5HcKsH3X1o_C5bcLYt4339Uq2-wsENYPbO9AaIQat3Pub0oPPjYjB_cqyXwbl3h_JIpVIgaOSiCXEveyJzvjUrTtjMBmL4kmhcKG4-vKkumlqqndNLPRR_YgMkU6JN6OL18s5NQd94lvq-R2FFhejWSU-37L7Qj6j5lWW)**

clean_body: This is why we need to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE | Friend, President Biden keeps putting America Last: ❌ He stopped the Keystone pipeline and made us less energy independent ❌ He re-entered the Paris Accord and gave MAJOR concessions to China ❌ He gave away America’s vaccine intellectual property FOR FREE President Biden’s genius plan to fight climate change is to...cede our energy security to Russia and Saudi Arabia by canceling the Keystone pipeline? Then he waives sanctions on Russia’s pipeline to let them build it? Every day, Joe Biden is proving that the era of prioritizing America over other countries is finished. | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- God Bless, Rep. Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: message from Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | | Flagging this message from Katie Porter. Tomorrow is a critical filing deadline for my campaign. In fact, it’s the final one before the primary in less than two weeks.

I need to be clear: the outcome of this filing deadline will have a direct impact on the primary. I know I can win and polling shows I have upward momentum.

I need you by my side. We are spending down to zero every day so we need to keep the resources coming in and I need to have a strong showing for this deadline. There is absolutely no other option.

Here’s the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3osafJmjLYxFNaQzLV6qt_oz8S0qOH_a32BSs3rY53j_2IzcePfwquvoYkwC71gkJXx47CY1I4xFfwfpAnQ_PmJT_b1QHW6ERbb9NS-zf44p9otaA37v7c57FgT0Ko7NUPsGmtNGulXgD24FHTUXsFcTcbwy11bvuSJUfkaBGUOGhn60eajOedOOYhTA-oYW3RV34ECgUfcFoov8XJbEAdpXFFQVcplJ_5UDRy1QdmQPY9XagrtxMBJTt-AfwEAEduM8oJibEIBVnG3JsX_sUM-ZgtsEUsdDnASaXcjouZFVbMQ4ZTEMubEQRhQA8pVo4lCRK8kUG8leap5sTzmP4JzA/3c8/BL09-2HhTUyKA0UOcOLZqQ/h0/dAvaxwOOCovRAyzv0wXHf1Es0WGBOXoEH_tG-04eEaQ)

Thanks,

Jennifer

Begin forwarded message:

>
> You already know that I endorsed Jennifer Carroll Foy. She’s a once-in-a-lifetime candidate who knows what it's like to struggle to make ends meet, go without healthcare, and raise a family as a working mom.
>
> **I’m reaching out today because we are exactly TWO weeks out from her primary, and this Thursday, Jennifer’s campaign is facing her FINAL pre-primary filing deadline.**
>
> We saw during the last filing how Jennifer’s strong showing was all the buzz. She proved that she has upward momentum and the ability to mobilize a diverse coalition of Democratic voters, unlike her opponent.
>
> **[Can I count on you to contribute to Jennifer’s campaign so that she can have another strong showing when it matters the most?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3osafJmjLYxFNaQzLV6qt_oz8S0qOH_a32BSs3rY53j_3KiPwtRiW041yI3zjyLdHJlTbSSK9ZVuhzNMUbO0dklAhesMUpq4-Y0ioQ5IaSli65WSowI_UsaTulx2Sl-Wg6J4NK-Z7FRFjYnuedp2eZtIeWaUVj0aryze9jVdkJdzoKuhEMj1r61aXCeEVbyeCb4jPXo4it-ClIuF-y1o8PzAaAVnHkSFmq6-N32-ZHnGZdSgnPTMEpU7hjLPPfFstN992gc3YHsvjQ92A8W3BH4Dpe2ZQriXKBpd-qkHFX-PGiD-wfOVxGoriIWXZ1gEXbZPz0ZwiFtlq-LN3zw_yG1Q/3c8/BL09-2HhTUyKA0UOcOLZqQ/h1/cF5kcCN9xAREDKAXFY8-YNKRclNuuL12uU8xcFz-TcQ)**
>
> I’ve been excited about Jennifer’s candidacy for a while now and I can’t wait for her to be elected governor -- but that will only happen with grassroots momentum powering her campaign to victory.
>
> Jennifer and I have so much in common. I ran for Congress because the status quo wasn’t good enough. Jennifer has put public service first in her life. She has championed the rights of marginalized people and working Virginians as a public defender and public servant in the legislature. She helped expand Medicaid and hasn't taken a dime from Dominion energy, unlike her opponent. She has a plan for Virginia’s future.
>
> **Polling shows Jenn has momentum to defy the odds again and be elected as the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[But she needs your help with only two weeks left to go. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3osafJmjLYxFNaQzLV6qt_oz8S0qOH_a32BSs3rY53j_1FZcq3aTXdCi74xRoDW_DHu835yH2sT7oRMubXbFZTtC5XyGeSPwRoQtW8OGNOE2JG9DjgBHwMRSkbkuxCeFtQ10M8NgNj9-jzBrVBZAmv0YOrvd96cnTqTNW9FqVpgyCjeQh7nG4_icrwxcXvdrqsXyJEJi3eVBXCBftcIc_eqIJNEKmXhYtdrTCYrVtjtC3Y7NLaCIQQC4e8rymeK_zxFp6P1VL96-ftmTeYfcyIsCOv1kJAiHNiUI6xIf0tD1r4pyoKvbrCAXEvXO7W6Zaev0HOpJlycOSEpep6_mPfKA/3c8/BL09-2HhTUyKA0UOcOLZqQ/h2/KPWNty2lO5KRr_9RniYgNiVFGlunFH8YpBP9G5QkX-U)**
>
> Thanks for being in this fight,
>
> Katie Porter
>
>
>
* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa9XVn4kTPocpK2F5sq7n-B-ElRMv87cGlnnvx-8rpMk1pwvDE4mi6YeRz4cEuA2Fp-du_2yIKm-BIleWExmewh3_kZ9c5hd6u7untebr3rpusY3iEL8os2sKfbdW4dmbP72unbAwT_Rk2-mEEo6_prDI4YC6Ik_rKJKlehwNuZEqJ72nwf8hNm2S6FUswSWZxDpeReWWQ3zCz9HzTCH118TfScjWAsny3XfyJSJonq7m/3c8/BL09-2HhTUyKA0UOcOLZqQ/h3/MhDQbixG5bDq_2c-hMR1V77_hwMZ1IqEwhgSj5EicHw)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN58z3vFAlzvu3ErLyPr3cygUlT-3Ifr10lF2T604GzenKd3Edbj3f5JUeII-AG1xmGOYFzIV8VhFKwXzQDYJxOXdjMtstbDusz1ZmyewJ21_qNrnLyUtb_RJUNzEdRi-CThoaujd3I_3UMkxGlgywN2nRn7aeXJqrg-DP7Eehl_W0LxZkfUvx8UwEb0x6_VUmEMWoA6e2WE_mKppgngPA0xKXpFWrTPEK1tHS7_Hk_ET2gXd2SGojgNJu_Gj5EQzlUMkpPv8K7POPk9BYrW4jn-8/3c8/BL09-2HhTUyKA0UOcOLZqQ/h4/gCMo74H7VFamntKHSUVPLckoJ44vd35Pb_zZ2WgNC5Q) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

subject: The Cost of Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Kansas is beginning to see the true costs of Pelosi and Biden's economic policy. It NOT good. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

We're seeing the same numbers you are, and it's shocking. **The prices of essential goods and services have skyrocketed** from where they were just one year ago before _**Biden and Pelosi rammed their massive spending plans through Congress. **_
---
| Let's take a look:
* Gas prices have **risen over 70%**
* The cost of lumber is up **more than 300%**
* Used cars are up **over 20%**
* The price of food rising steadily, including essential Kansas products, such as **wheat and beef**
* Energy prices have **risen 25%**
* and _**out of control inflation is hurting Kansans**_

---
| [Rush in $25 to help us Take Back the House](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9406d68309&e=1050d051da "Rush in $25 to help us Take Back the House")
---
| Biden made a promise that nobody making less than $400,000 will pay more in taxes. Well, we have news for him: **Inflation is a tax on everyone.**

Congressman LaTurner needs your help so Republicans can take back the House, and stop Biden's reckless actions that are hurting our economy. Would you be able to help us out with [a donation](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=fe281f7c9b&e=1050d051da)[ to our campaign?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0674303eb3&e=1050d051da)

Congressman LaTurner was elected because he promised fiscal responsibility in his [Contract With Kansas](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d5a11ef0f3&e=1050d051da). It's time that Congress lives within its means, _**just like Kansas families do.**_

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
|
